name: subagent-reports
title: Sub-Agent Reports
purpose: Typed, durable ADV sub-agent report ingestion and readback. Replaces ADV worker final-message fenced JSON with Zod-validated tool-call submission, signal persistence on tasks, deterministic dedupe, and machine-readable downstream consumers.

requirements.title: Typed tool-call report ingest
requirements.body: ADV worker reports MUST be submitted through adv_subagent_report_submit using strict Zod-validated payloads. Version 1 supports adv-engineer and adv-reviewer payloads, reserves adv-researcher and adv-tron discriminator literals for future extension, and rejects malformed or unsupported payloads before persistence.

scenarios.title: Malformed report rejected
given: A caller submits a report missing required fields
then: The tool returns INVALID_REPORT
No workflow signal is fired
No agenda follow-up is written

scenarios.title: Reserved agent rejected until schema populated
given: A report uses agent adv-researcher or adv-tron
then: The tool returns UNSUPPORTED_AGENT
The reserved literal remains part of the agent discriminator surface
No workflow signal is fired

requirements.title: Signal-persisted task report state
requirements.body: Accepted reports MUST persist via subagentReportSubmittedSignal on the owning task as task.subagent_reports[]. The workflow MUST dedupe repeated submissions by (change_id, task_id, agent, attempt) using deterministic workflow state, and MUST map report blockers into task error_recovery without defineUpdate-based mutations.

scenarios.title: Duplicate report key is idempotent
given: A task already stores a report for change_id, task_id, agent, and attempt
scenarios.when: The same report is submitted again
then: No duplicate task.subagent_reports entry is appended
The workflow records the key in seenReportIds if needed
The tool response reports duplicate true

scenarios.title: Blockers feed error recovery
given: A submitted engineer blocker or reviewer blocking finding exists
then: The task error_recovery.last_error summarizes blocker location and issue
The error_recovery attempt records the report attempt number
No tool-layer heuristic owns persistence correctness

requirements.title: Queryable reports and consumers
requirements.body: adv_change_show include.subagentReports MUST return persisted report data. Reports MUST remain on task.subagent_reports[]. Tool-layer consumers MUST process follow_ups into agenda items and surface verification cross-check warnings without rolling back an already persisted report.

scenarios.title: Reports are queryable by change
given: A task has one or more persisted sub-agent reports
scenarios.when: adv_change_show is called with include.subagentReports true
then: The response includes _subagentReports
The response includes _subagentReportsMeta.total
The task entry still includes subagent_reports

scenarios.title: Follow-ups become agenda items after persistence
then: The report signal is fired before agenda writes
Each follow-up is added with category subagent-followup
Consumer failures are returned as warnings

requirements.title: No ADV worker fenced-report transport
requirements.body: ADV worker contracts MUST instruct adv-engineer and adv-reviewer to call adv_subagent_report_submit before exit. Apply, review, and harden context packets MUST include ATTEMPT so the report key is stable. Legacy TaskStructuredOutput extraction remains available for non-ADV callers but MUST short-circuit for tasks that already have persisted sub-agent reports.

scenarios.title: Worker contracts use tool-call transport
given: adv-engineer or adv-reviewer is spawned by ADV
then: The worker builds an ENGINEER_REPORT or REVIEWER_REPORT object
The worker calls adv_subagent_report_submit with that object
The worker does not rely on final-message fenced JSON as the ADV report transport

scenarios.title: Legacy extraction skips persisted report tasks
scenarios.when: adv_task_checkpoint or compatible task completion sees legacy adv-output text
then: The completion signal omits structured_output extracted from the legacy text
Existing non-ADV structured_output behavior remains unchanged for tasks without subagent_reports
